stadium.name: The Aegis Field
stadium.description: A pristine field within the main temple compound, used as the central training ground for the Shield. The pitch is bordered by the library and monastery, and is said to be protected by the twin lights, Dawn's Hope and Silver Twilight.

stats.pregame_ritual: Tying their bootlaces together and hopping to the starting line.
Re-taping their shield's handle with fresh leather.
Whispering a secret fear to the Trollball before the game.
Drinking a full waterskin of lukewarm water.
Drawing a detailed, anatomically incorrect diagram of a troll's head.
Passing a 'team luckstone' from player to player without speaking.
Chewing a specific, bitter root said to improve night vision.
Jogging three laps around the perimeter of the field.
Kissing their biceps and whispering words of encouragement to them.
Trying to teach a stray dog a complicated and useless new trick.
Challenging a spectator to a game of tic-tac-toe in the dirt.

stadium.name: The Cliffside Pitch
stadium.description: A perilous, windswept field built next to the town's lighthouse. There is no ocean-side barrier, and the wind is notoriously unpredictable. The tusk-like lighthouse is the only landmark.

stats.pregame_ritual: Telling each other exaggerated lies about their own strength.
Stretching their hamstrings for exactly seven minutes.
Rubbing the Trollball on their armpits for 'grip'.
Arranging their gear in a perfect, aesthetically pleasing spiral.
Adjusting their codpiece with theatrical importance.
Getting a teammate to pour a bucket of cold water over their head.
Muttering a nonsensical rhyme to ward off bad spirits.
Filing down a single fingernail into a sharp point.
Giving the Trollball a heroic backstory before each game.
Listening to the wind for a sign of which way the game will turn.
Wearing a necklace of polished river stones.

preGame:
Good evening, folks, and welcome to the grandest spectacle of brute force and breathtaking skill! By the beard of King Nezmear, this is it! The Grand Finals Bracket Reset, all tied up in knotty drama, and the fate of the Trollball Crown hangs in the balance here on Osterra! Tonight, the formidable Southport Narwhals stride out to face the bastion of piety, the glorious Haven Lights, right here in the sacred confines of The Aegis Field!

This pristine pitch, blessed by the Twinlight's Glow and protected by the Shield's Watch, feels like it was woven from the very fabric of the temple itself—a fitting stage for the Haven Lights, whose devout fans have been roaring with fervor! But don't let the sanctity fool ya, friends; the Narwhals are here to bring the thunder and the gale-force winds from the coastal territories!

The Narwhals, whose supporters have been making some mighty noise lately, are primed for violence, and you can see it in their rituals! While some of the pious youngsters of the Haven Lights are fussing over tying their laces just so, the mighty Cibis Areta of the Narwhals is demanding that a teammate douse her in a bucket of freezing water—a proper baptism by brute force to prepare for the fray!

And let's speak of the Haven Lights! Despite being somewhat overshadowed by the booming enthusiasm for the Ebon Gate Corruptors—my own champions, naturally—their devotion to their sacred ground is undeniable. Look at Dickenson Beker, teaching a stray beast a complicated trick; that’s the dedication of a true worshipper of light! But will their pristine traditions withstand the tidal wave of Narwhal mayhem?

It's going to be a magnificent clash of the storm and the shrine! Prepare yourselves, fair listeners, for a battle where the only acceptable language is the glorious bellow of battle! Let's get ready to witness the raw, glorious, bloody beauty of Trollball!
postGame: Folks, hold the presses! Stop the clock! What a titanic struggle we have just witnessed here at The Aegis Field! The Southport Narwhals, riding the sheer will of the Grimfrost spirit, have managed to claw their way to victory over the staunch, yet ultimately brittle, Haven Lights! The final whistle blows, the score stands at one point to zero, and the Narwhals have reset the bracket and snatched the momentum of this titanic Best of Five series!
